tables.description: This subject phenotype data table includes subject sex, age, year of enrollment, receipt of seasonal influenza vaccine (n=3; 2008-2010), recipet of 2009 pH1N1 swine influenza vaccine, virus detected in nasal wash, antiviral drug taken by subjects, maximum oral temperature on first day of illness, duration of symptoms, and log2 antibody titers (n=4 variables; hemagglutination inhibition assay; Time: baseline, acute infection, convalescent, and spring).

variables.name: Age
variables.description: Subject age on the day of the first illness visit

variables.name: Duration
variables.description: Duration of symptoms

variables.name: HAI_H1N1_Acute_Infection
variables.description: Log2 antibody titer, hemagglutination inhibition assay; H1N1 antigen; acute infection

variables.name: HAI_H1N1_Baseline
variables.description: Log2 antibody titer, hemagglutination inhibition assay; H1N1 antigen; baseline

variables.name: HAI_H1N1_Convalescent
variables.description: Log2 antibody titer, hemagglutination inhibition assay; H1N1 antigen; convalescent

variables.name: HAI_H1N1_Spring
variables.description: Log2 antibody titer, hemagglutination inhibition assay; H1N1 antigen; spring

variables.name: Medications
variables.description: Antiviral drug taken by the subjects

variables.name: Oral_temperature
variables.description: Maximum oral temperature on the first day of illness

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified Subject ID

variables.name: Seasonal_flu_vaccine_2008
variables.description: Prior receipt of 2008 seasonal influenza vaccine

variables.name: Seasonal_flu_vaccine_2009
variables.description: Prior receipt of  2009 seasonal influenza vaccine

variables.name: Seasonal_flu_vaccine_2010
variables.description: Prior receipt of 2010 seasonal influenza vaccine

variables.name: Virus_by_PCR
variables.description: Virus detected in nasal wash specimens collected during the first illness visit, RT-PCR assay

variables.name: Year_Enrollment
variables.description: Year of enrollment

variables.name: pH1N1_swine_flu_vaccine_2009
variables.description: Prior receipt of  2009 pH1N1 swine influenza vaccine

variables.name: sex
variables.description: Gender of participant

tables.description: This sample attributes data table includes body site where sample was collected, analyte type, genotyping and sequencing centers, and sample collection date.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: COMMENT
variables.description: Sample collection date

variables.name: GENOTYPING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted genotyping

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

tables.description: This subject GEO mapping data table includes a mapping of subject IDs to GEO accession IDs, and RNA IDs collected different time points.

variables.name: GEO_ACCESSION
variables.description: GEO ACCESSION ID

variables.name: GEO_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: GEO Sample ID - RNA samples obtained at different time points.

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
